title: Unreal 128x Sword and Axe Overlay
description: A 128x sword and axe overlay for Minecraft version 1.20+.
body: Unreal 128x Sword and Axe Overlay is an overlay for Minecraft version 1.20.1 and up. This retextures all swords and axes, making axes look like scythes, and uses a 128 by 128 pixel resolution. You can put this pack above any other pack and the overlay's textures will be visible as well as everything else from the pack under it. Enjoy!
